description: Rogue Frontier Patch 2 (26 February 2025) — Season Winner Statues Added, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Portal Towns can now be set as Home

subitems.text: Players now receive a warning when leaving a Portal Town for the Outlands if the Homesick debuff will be triggered

items.text: The cooldown on Hideout Headquarters Boosters has been reduced from 90 days to 60 days, reflecting the new, shorter Guild Season duration

subitems.text: Guilds which have already used their Booster this season will find its current cooldown also reduced by 30 days after this patch

items.text: Smuggler Coins no longer leave trash when destroyed
Trash once again has a 100% destruction rate when killed or ejected from the Roads of Avalon (as was the case before the release of Rogue Frontier)
Added new Albion Journal missions for Kill Trophies in the Social & Guild category, under the Player Interactions subcategory

sections.searchable_text: Changes Portal Towns can now be set as Home Players now receive a warning when leaving a Portal Town for the Outlands if the Homesick debuff will be triggered The cooldown on Hideout Headquarters Boosters has been reduced from 90 days to 60 days, reflecting the new, shorter Guild Season duration Guilds which have already used their Booster this season will find its current cooldown also reduced by 30 days after this patch Smuggler Coins no longer leave trash when destroyed Trash once again has a 100% destruction rate when killed or ejected from the Roads of Avalon (as was the case before the release of Rogue Frontier) Added new Albion Journal missions for Kill Trophies in the Social & Guild category, under the Player Interactions subcategory

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.description: Astral Staff had been too powerful in group fights, so Starfall’s damage output has been reduced to bring it more in line with other AoE pressure weapons.

items.text: Starfall (Astral Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Astral Staff had been too powerful in group fights, so Starfall’s damage output has been reduced to bring it more in line with other AoE pressure weapons. Starfall (Astral Staff) Damage per tick: 66 → 63

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.description: Razor Cut’s lifesteal effect has been significantly buffed to increase its impact.

items.text: Razor Cut (Bear Paws)

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Razor Cut’s lifesteal effect has been significantly buffed to increase its impact. Razor Cut (Bear Paws) Lifesteal: 10% → 20%

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.description: Bows had fallen out of the meta following previous nerfs, so a portion of their power has been restored.

items.text: Enchanted Quiver (Bow)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Bows had fallen out of the meta following previous nerfs, so a portion of their power has been restored. Enchanted Quiver (Bow) Attack damage increase: 220% → 230%

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.description: Twin Slayers have been performing well, but since it never feels good to be unable to recall your daggers due to a lack of energy, the entire energy cost is now paid up front.

items.text: Ring of Death (Twin Slayers)

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Twin Slayers have been performing well, but since it never feels good to be unable to recall your daggers due to a lack of energy, the entire energy cost is now paid up front. Ring of Death (Twin Slayers) Cast energy cost: 6 → 12 Recast energy cost: 6 → 0

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.description: Infernal Staff has struggled to find its place in the meta. As a result, its fear duration has been increased to allow more set-up time on the primary target, and require enemies to pay more attention to its fiery trail.

items.text: Combustion (Infernal Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Infernal Staff has struggled to find its place in the meta. As a result, its fear duration has been increased to allow more set-up time on the primary target, and require enemies to pay more attention to its fiery trail. Combustion (Infernal Staff) Fear duration: 0.75s → 1.25s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.description: Fireflash Orb’s damage bonus has been increased to further reward Hellfire Imp players for hitting targets from greater distances.

items.text: Fireflash Orb (Hellspawn Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Fireflash Orb’s damage bonus has been increased to further reward Hellfire Imp players for hitting targets from greater distances. Fireflash Orb (Hellspawn Staff) Bonus damage per tick: 30 → 33

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.description: Clarent Blade had been affected by multiple tangential nerfs, so in order to revitalize it, the value of its secondary effect has been increased across all stack counts.

items.text: Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade)
Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair)

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Clarent Blade had been affected by multiple tangential nerfs, so in order to revitalize it, the value of its secondary effect has been increased across all stack counts. Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade) 1 stack slow duration: 2s → 2.25s 2 stack silence duration: 2s → 2.25s 3 stack damage: 155 → 160 Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair) Cast time: 1.1s → 0.9s

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.description: Earth Crusher’s knock-up duration has been extended to further highlight its utility.

items.text: Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus)
Shockwave (all Gloves)

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Earth Crusher’s knock-up duration has been extended to further highlight its utility. Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus) Knock-up duration: 1s → 1.2s Shockwave (all Gloves) Damage: 106 → 122

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.description: While Firebreath is a popular solo PvE item, its damage has been increased to improve its success in PvP encounters.

items.text: Firebreath (Mage Cowl)
All Gathering Caps

subitems.text: Additional ability: Emergency Shield (same as the Guardian Helmet ability)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets While Firebreath is a popular solo PvE item, its damage has been increased to improve its success in PvP encounters. Firebreath (Mage Cowl) Damage per tick: 33 → 36 All Gathering Caps Additional ability: Emergency Shield (same as the Guardian Helmet ability)

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.description: While the adoption of Demon Boots following its previous buffs has been satisfying, they now offer too much mobility at higher health percentages. Therefore, their buff duration and move speed bonus per stack have been reduced slightly.

items.text: Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes While the adoption of Demon Boots following its previous buffs has been satisfying, they now offer too much mobility at higher health percentages. Therefore, their buff duration and move speed bonus per stack have been reduced slightly. Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots) Move speed bonus per stack: 25% → 22% Duration: 6s → 5s

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.description: Toxic Reaction has been removed, as it had the potential to put the mount's rider into combat unintentionally, hindering their ability to flee.

items.text: Toxic Reaction (Pest Lizard) has been removed

subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Toxic Reaction has been removed, as it had the potential to put the mount's rider into combat unintentionally, hindering their ability to flee. Toxic Reaction (Pest Lizard) has been removed

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Dodge (all T4+ Shoes): Fixed issue where immunity could be purged
Interrupt (Swords): Fixed issue where the buff icon did not match the spell icon

Toxic Cloud (Pest Lizard), Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot), Boulder Crash (Earthrune Staff), Sky’s Fury (Skystrider Bow), and Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands) now have more accurate spell indication areas
Fixed several spell tooltips with more accurate descriptions

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Dodge (all T4+ Shoes): Fixed issue where immunity could be purged Interrupt (Swords): Fixed issue where the buff icon did not match the spell icon Toxic Cloud (Pest Lizard), Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot), Boulder Crash (Earthrune Staff), Sky’s Fury (Skystrider Bow), and Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands) now have more accurate spell indication areas Fixed several spell tooltips with more accurate descriptions

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where sorting options in the Guild Rights Management UI behaved incorrectly
Fixed issue where filtering the Bank Overview by all tiers would filter out all tiers, rather than including them
Fixed issue where several categories in the Rankings UI were not displaying in the correct order
Fixed issue where some T3 weapons had their abilities displayed in the wrong order on the Item Details UI
Fixed issue where Hellion Hood spells were displayed in the wrong order on the Item Details UI
Fixed issue where hovering over an item’s Average Price or Market History at the Marketplace would not display the exact amount
Fixed issue where different travel costs could be displayed for the same journey, depending on the UI
Fixed issue where the region map would not display City Plot details if opened while changing regions
Fixed issue where the Arena Match invitation pop-up could be closed with the ESC key without canceling the match, preventing entry
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where Marketplace category filters could not be changed

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where sorting options in the Guild Rights Management UI behaved incorrectly Fixed issue where filtering the Bank Overview by all tiers would filter out all tiers, rather than including them Fixed issue where several categories in the Rankings UI were not displaying in the correct order Fixed issue where some T3 weapons had their abilities displayed in the wrong order on the Item Details UI Fixed issue where Hellion Hood spells were displayed in the wrong order on the Item Details UI Fixed issue where hovering over an item’s Average Price or Market History at the Marketplace would not display the exact amount Fixed issue where different travel costs could be displayed for the same journey, depending on the UI Fixed issue where the region map would not display City Plot details if opened while changing regions Fixed issue where the Arena Match invitation pop-up could be closed with the ESC key without canceling the match, preventing entry [CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where Marketplace category filters could not be changed

subsections.heading: Albion Journal Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where missions to free Captured Smugglers would not grant progress to party members
Fixed issue where missions to defeat Ghouls and Brawlers did not count all types
Fixed issue where defeating Archers within Avalonian Dungeons counted towards the wrong Albion Journal mission

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Fixes Fixed issue where missions to free Captured Smugglers would not grant progress to party members Fixed issue where missions to defeat Ghouls and Brawlers did not count all types Fixed issue where defeating Archers within Avalonian Dungeons counted towards the wrong Albion Journal mission

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where items recovered to a city bank could not be accessed from a corresponding island bank
Fixed issue where the Smuggler’s Den and Hideout Fame buffs could stack
Fixed issue where having an Awakened Item in equipment or inventory would trigger spell cooldowns when changing regions
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
